---
title: "besoegsdag_2"
subtitle: "`besoegsdag_2`"
description: "besoegsdag_2"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besoegsdag_2/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                               | Title                            | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|------------------------------------|----------------------------------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                            | The unique name of the event     | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `center`                           | Research center                  | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `date_v2`                          | date_v2                          | date     | Date of visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `staff_initials_v2`                | staff_initials_v2                | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the screening. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `identified_name_cpr_v2`           | identified_name_cpr_v2           | string   | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `consent_share_info_gp_v2`         | consent_share_info_gp_v2         | string   | Consent for sharing relevant health information from the study with the participant's general practitioner for purposes of treatment and safety. Consent can be withdrawn at any time. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `fasting_status_v2`                | fasting_status_v2                | string   | Indicates if the participant has been fasting since 10 pm the night before. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `last_meal_time_v2`                | last_meal_time_v2                | datetime | Indicates the time of the participant's last meal before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `food_intake_nonfast_v2`           | food_intake_nonfast_v2           | string   | Indicates what food and when the participant has eaten it, if the participant has not been fasting from 10 pm the day before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `alcohol_v2`                       | alcohol_v2                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided alcohol the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `alcohol_intake_v2`                | alcohol_intake_v2                | string   | Indicates how much alcohol the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `caffeine_v2`                      | caffeine_v2                      | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided caffeinated beverages the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `caffeine_intake_v2`               | caffeine_intake_v2               | string   | Indicates how much caffeine the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `no_exercise_24h_v2`               | no_exercise_24h_v2               | string   | Indicates if the participant did any intense activity or excercise the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `exercise_24h_v2`                  | exercise_24h_v2                  | string   | Indicates how much intense activity or exercise the participant did and when the past 24 hours. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `smoking_v2`                       | smoking_v2                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided smpking since the night before. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `smoking_amount_v2`                | smoking_amount_v2                | string   | Indicates how much smoking the participant has done and when since last night. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `no_medication_before_v2`          | no_medication_before_v2          | string   | Indicates if the participant took medication the morning before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `medication_before_v2`             | medication_before_v2             | string   | Description of the medication the participant took the morning before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `not_active_transportation_v2`     | not_active_transportation_v2     | string   | Indicates if the participant used motorized/not-active transportation to SDCC before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `transportation_v2`                | transportation_v2                | string   | Description of the active transportation before the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `stool_sample_v2`                  | stool_sample_v2                  | string   | Indicates whether the participant brought a stool sample like instructed. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `stool_sample_return_v2`           | stool_sample_return_v2           | string   | Date for return of the stool sample. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sens_returned_v2`                 | sens_returned_v2                 | string   | SENS returned. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `sens_early_removal_v2`            | sens_early_removal_v2            | string   | Indicates if the SENS device fell off/ was taken off before the decided measuring time was over. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sens_early_removal_why_v2`        | sens_early_removal_why_v2        | string   | Indicates why and when the SENS device was taken off. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_returning_date_v2`           | sens_returning_date_v2           | string   | Date for returned SENS. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `sens_nr_v2`                       | sens_nr_v2                       | string   | SENS number. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `sens_upload_ldrive_v2`            | sens_upload_ldrive_v2            | string   | SENS data saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_upload_v2`                   | sens_upload_v2                   | string   | Upload sens activity file in excel. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `sensor_reuse_v2`                  | sensor_reuse_v2                  | string   | Whether the sensor is put in the right reuse box. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `cgm_returned_v2`                  | cgm_returned_v2                  | string   | Whether the CGM has been returned. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `cgm_when_v2`                      | cgm_when_v2                      | string   | If not, note the date that it will be returned. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `cgm_discontinue_v2`               | cgm_discontinue_v2               | string   | Indicates whether the CGM was taken off/ fell off before the planned measuring period was over. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `cgm_discontinue_why_v2`           | cgm_discontinue_why_v2           | string   | Indicates why and when the CGM was taken off/ fell off. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `cgm_when_info_v2`                 | cgm_when_info_v2                 | string   | Write to Carolien when the CGM device will be received. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `cgm_reader_v2`                    | cgm_reader_v2                    | string   | The same reader as at visit 1 has to be used. Visit 2. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][cgmreader_v1]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `libreview_v2`                     | libreview_v2                     | string   | Whether the data has been uploaded to LibreView. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_v2`           | cgm_csvsaved_ldrive_v2           | string   | Cgm data in csv-file saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_v2`           | cgm_pdfsaved_ldrive_v2           | string   | AGP rapport with cmg data saved on L-drive. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `cgm_glucosedata_upload_v2`        | cgm_glucosedata_upload_v2        | string   | Upload of cgm data (csv-file). Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `cgm_avg_v2`                       | cgm_avg_v2                       | number   | Average glucose measured by CGM. Mmol/L. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sys_bp_left_1_v2`                 | sys_bp_left_1_v2                 | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, first measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dia_bp_left_1_v2`                 | dia_bp_left_1_v2                 | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, first measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `sys_bp_left_2_v2`                 | sys_bp_left_2_v2                 | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, second measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dia_bp_left_2_v2`                 | dia_bp_left_2_v2                 | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, second measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sys_bp_left_3_v2`                 | sys_bp_left_3_v2                 | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, third measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dia_bp_left_3_v2`                 | dia_bp_left_3_v2                 | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, left arm, third measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `sys_bp_right_1_v2`                | sys_bp_right_1_v2                | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, first measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `dia_bp_right_1_v2`                | dia_bp_right_1_v2                | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, first measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `sys_bp_right_2_v2`                | sys_bp_right_2_v2                | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, second measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `dia_bp_right_2_v2`                | dia_bp_right_2_v2                | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, second measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sys_bp_right_3_v2`                | sys_bp_right_3_v2                | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, third measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `dia_bp_right_3_v2`                | dia_bp_right_3_v2                | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, right arm, third measurement.  Participant sitting after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sys_bp_left_mean_v2`              | sys_bp_left_mean_v2              | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of two systolic BP measurements on left arm. Visit 2. Derived using the formula: if( [sys_bp_left_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]<>'', ([sys_bp_left_3_v2]+[sys_bp_left_2_v2])/2, if( [sys_bp_left_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]='', [sys_bp_left_3_v2], if( [sys_bp_left_3_v2]='' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]<>'', [sys_bp_left_2_v2], '')))                |
| `sys_bp_right_mean_v2`             | sys_bp_right_mean_v2             | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of two systolic BP measurements on right arm. Visit 2. Derived using the formula: if( [sys_bp_right_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_right_2_v2]<>'', ([sys_bp_right_3_v2]+[sys_bp_right_2_v2])/2, if( [sys_bp_right_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_right_2_v2]='', [sys_bp_right_3_v2], if( [sys_bp_right_3_v2]='' and [sys_bp_right_2_v2]<>'', [sys_bp_right_2_v2], '' ) )) |
| `bp_chosen_arm_v2`                 | bp_chosen_arm_v2                 | string   | Arm used for future blood pressure measurements. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2`     | finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2     | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of finger cuff (S, M or L). Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2`        | finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2        | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of arm cuff (S, M or L). Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `finapres_minus20_v2`              | finapres_minus20_v2              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 1, performed approximately 20 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `bloodsample_minus15_v2`           | bloodsample_minus15_v2           | string   | Record whether the participant completed bloodsample measurement 1, performed approximately 15 minutes prior to the intervention. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `vas_minus10_v2`                   | vas_minus10_v2                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 1, performed approximately 10 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_minus5_v2`            | bloodsample_minus5_v2            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time -5. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `timer_started_v2`                 | timer_started_v2                 | string   | Record whether the timer was started at the time of test drink consumption (defined as time 0). Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `mmtt_shake_bar_v2`                | mmtt_shake_bar_v2                | string   | Record whether the participant completed both shake and bar. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `shake_bar_time_min_v2`            | shake_bar_time_min_v2            | string   | The number of minutes it took the participant to consume the test shake and bar, if the total consumption time exceeded 10 minutes. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `mmtt_shake_v2`                    | mmtt_shake_v2                    | string   | The amount of the shake the participant drank. Text field. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `mmtt_bar_v2`                      | mmtt_bar_v2                      | string   | The amount of the bar the participant ate. Text field. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time15_v2`               | finapres_time15_v2               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 2, performed approximately 15 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bloodsample_time30_v2`            | bloodsample_time30_v2            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 30. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time30_v2`                    | vas_time30_v2                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 2, performed approximately 30 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time45_v2`               | finapres_time45_v2               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 3, performed approximately 45 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bloodsample_time60_v2`            | bloodsample_time60_v2            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 60. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time60_v2`                    | vas_time60_v2                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 3, performed approximately 60 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time75_v2`               | finapres_time75_v2               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 4, performed approximately 75 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bloodsample_time90_v2`            | bloodsample_time90_v2            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 90. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time90_v2`                    | vas_time90_v2                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 4, performed approximately 90 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_time105_v2`              | finapres_time105_v2              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 5, performed approximately 105 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_time120_v2`           | bloodsample_time120_v2           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 120. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time120_v2`                   | vas_time120_v2                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 5, performed approximately 120 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time135_v2`              | finapres_time135_v2              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 6, performed approximately 135 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bloodsample_time180_v2`           | bloodsample_time180_v2           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 180. Visit 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `vas_time180_v2`                   | vas_time180_v2                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 6, performed approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time195_v2`              | finapres_time195_v2              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 7, performed approximately 195 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `bloodsample_time240_v2`           | bloodsample_time240_v2           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `vas_time240_v2`                   | vas_time240_v2                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 7, performed approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_time255_v2`              | finapres_time255_v2              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 8, performed approximately 255 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `finapres_upload_ldrive_v2`        | finapres_upload_ldrive_v2        | string   | Indicates whetner or not the Finapres data is saved on the L-drive. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `food_v2`                          | food_v2                          | string   | Food delivered. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sens_deviation_v2`                | sens_deviation_v2                | string   | States if there has been any deviations in SENS. Yes/No. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sens_deviation_describe_v2`       | sens_deviation_describe_v2       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the SENS activity tracker. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v2`          | mmtt_blood_deviation_v2          | string   | Deviations related to blood sampling procedure. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v2` | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v2 | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `finapres_deviation_v2`            | finapres_deviation_v2            | string   | Deviations related to finappres procedure. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v2`   | finapres_deviation_describe_v2   | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `vas_deviation_v2`                 | vas_deviation_v2                 | string   | Deviations related to VAS procedure. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v2`        | vas_deviation_describe_v2        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS during MMTT. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_deviations_v2`              | other_deviations_v2              | string   | Other deviations. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `other_deviations_describe_v2`     | other_deviations_describe_v2     | string   | Description of any other deviations. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `comments_end_v2`                  | comments_end_v2                  | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

: Fields in the `besoegsdag_2` resource.
